abstract: Comprehensive performance optimization guide for React 19/19.2 applications, designed for AI agents and LLMs. Contains 41 rules across 8 categories, prioritized by impact from critical (concurrent rendering, server components) to incremental (component patterns). Covers React 19.2 features including Activity, useEffectEvent, cacheSignal, and React Compiler v1.0. Each rule includes detailed explanations, real-world examples comparing incorrect vs. correct implementations, and specific impact metrics to guide automated refactoring and code generation.
